title: Registry audit
text: audit_everything() walks replication registry attempts every table figure listed engine (R Stata exist). meant health check: failures expected studies, data, dependencies change time. Key behaviour: patience (default 20 seconds) — table figure halted limit; audit continues next object. Failures stop run — results collected data frame. Report fields — study, object id, engine, success, elapsed seconds, timed-flag, short error snippet failure. Substantive checks (default substantive = TRUE) — study defines tests/substantive/<step_id>.R, audit compares replicated estimates published benchmarks (see Fearon & Laitin tab_1). Failures appear [substantive] printed summary. can restrict specific DOIs, collection tag, render Quarto report registry repository:
code: library(replicateEverything)  # Point at a local monorepo checkout (optional) options(   replicateEverything.registry_root = "/path/to/replicate_everything/registry",   replicateEverything.study_folders_root = "/path/to/replicate_everything",   replicateEverything.use_sibling_packages = TRUE )  audit <- audit_everything(patience = 20) print(audit) audit <- audit_everything(patience = 30, dois = "10.1257/aer.91.5.1369") audit <- audit_everything(patience = 20, collections = "APSR")  # Quarto report lives in the registry repo (sibling registry/ in a monorepo) quarto::quarto_render(audit_everything_qmd(), execute_params = list(patience = 20)) quarto::quarto_render(   audit_everything_qmd(),   execute_params = list(patience = 20, collections = "APSR") )

title: Registry audit
text: table built saved audit snapshot shipped package (inst/vignette-data/audit_latest.rds). Set REPLICATE_AUDIT_LIVE=true (point local monorepo) intend refresh snapshot.
code: audit <- if (run_live) {   tryCatch({     monorepo <- Sys.getenv("REPLICATE_MONOREPO", unset = "")     if (!nzchar(monorepo)) {       parent <- normalizePath(         file.path(find.package("replicateEverything"), "..", ".."),         mustWork = FALSE       )       if (file.exists(file.path(parent, "registry", "index.csv"))) {         monorepo <- parent       }     }     if (nzchar(monorepo)) {       options(         replicateEverything.registry_root = file.path(monorepo, "registry"),         replicateEverything.study_folders_root = monorepo,         replicateEverything.use_sibling_packages = TRUE       )     }     audit_everything(patience = 20, verbose = FALSE)   }, error = function(e) {     message("Live audit skipped: ", conditionMessage(e))     NULL   }) } else {   NULL }  if (is.null(audit) && nzchar(audit_rds) && file.exists(audit_rds)) {   audit <- readRDS(audit_rds) } if (is.null(audit)) {   stop("No audit results available.") } sm <- audit$summary results <- audit$results

title: Registry audit
text: Common reasons run fails times : Missing study package folder — install study repo locally set replicateEverything.study_folders_root monorepo root. Stata installed — Stata-backed entries fail Stata found; see Stata replications vignette. Network / data — folder-backed studies may need data files downloaded first run. Patience low — slow tables may need higher patience value without indicating true failure. Re-run locally refresh package vignette snapshot: adding updating registry stubs, maintainers typically run [refresh_registry()] index.csv audit stay sync:
code: Sys.setenv(REPLICATE_AUDIT_LIVE = "true") options(   replicateEverything.registry_root = "/path/to/replicate_everything/registry",   replicateEverything.study_folders_root = "/path/to/replicate_everything",   replicateEverything.use_sibling_packages = TRUE ) audit <- audit_everything(patience = 20) saveRDS(audit, "inst/vignette-data/audit_latest.rds")  # Full HTML report: quarto render audit_everything.qmd (in the registry repo) refresh_registry("../registry", audit = TRUE, patience = 20)

title: Meet the functions
text: Start index. load_index() returns registry index.csv data frame (DOI, title, journal, year, authors, study repo). Example output: search_papers() keyword-searches titles authors. Example output: one paper, list_replications() lists every registered table figure, including engine (r / stata) declared. Example output (abbreviated): list_replications(..., grouped = TRUE) returns one entry per logical group. R Stata exist table, default R. Pipeline steps (transforms) listed separately:
code: idx <- load_index() head(idx[, c("doi", "title", "year")]) #>                              doi                                    title year #> 1 10.1177/00491241211036161   Bounding Causes of Effects with Randomized... 2022 #> 2 10.1017/S0003055403000534   Ethnicity, Insurgency, and Civil War        2003 search_papers("insurgency") #>                              doi                                  title #> 1 10.1017/S0003055403000534 Ethnicity, Insurgency, and Civil War list_replications("10.1177/00491241211036161") #> [[1]] #> $id #> [1] "fig_1" #> $type #> [1] "figure" list_replications("10.1257/aer.91.5.1369", grouped = TRUE) list_replications("10.1257/aer.91.5.1369", grouped = TRUE, language = "stata") list_replications("10.1017/s0003055426101749", include = "pipeline")

text: replication.yml DAG: entry node id, type, code, data/inputs, outputs, (anything downstream another step) parents. Yaml sole authority runs order — nothing pipeline inferred guessed. what: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package

text: replicateEverything package provides tools discovering executing computational replications empirical research papers. connects public replication registry containing metadata, replication scripts, processed datasets required reproduce figures tables published studies.

title: replicateEverything: Reproduce Empirical Research Results — replicateEverything-package
text: typical workflow using package : Browse registry load_index() search_papers(). Inspect available replications using list_replications(). Run single table figure run_replication(doi, "fig_1"). Reproduce results run_replication(doi, "everything"). View replication code get_code(). Launch bundled Shiny demo run_shiny_app(), deploy save_local_shiny(). Contribute study build_study_outputs(), check_replication(), check_and_bake_study(), sync_study_to_registry() (maintainer). Audit full registry audit_everything(). See vignette("meet--functions") tour every main function.

text: Added install_dependencies(= ...), single maintainer entry point dependency setup mirrors build_outputs() / validate_outputs() scope pattern: pass study DOI/handle/path (default ".") install one study, = "everywhere" install every study registry index. Removed install_study_dependencies() install_registry_dependencies() exports (net API shrink: 29 → 28 exported functions). still exist unexported internals install_dependencies() dispatches — behavior change, public entry point moved. legacy alias kept. Updated call sites, hint text (maintainer_dependency_hint(), Stata/ code-tab setup messages, Shiny “Missing dependencies” copy), tests, README.md, maintainer-setup meet--functions vignettes, inst/ai/skills/*.md, root AI.md. build_study_outputs() / check_replication() / check_and_bake_study() remain three distinct, justified verbs (bake ; validate ; compose one-shot contributor onboarding). check_folder_replication() / check_package_replication() @describeIn check_replication internals merged check_replication’s single Rd topic — never separate exports reference-index entries. register_study() (check + sync one call) sync_study_to_registry() (sync primitive) kept deliberate primitive + one-shot-composer pair, pattern check_and_bake_study() build_study_outputs() + check_replication() — duplication. build_outputs() (DOI/registry-scoped maintainer dispatcher, mirrors validate_outputs()) build_study_outputs() (core one-study baker, used directly contributors internally build_outputs()) serve different personas duplicates.

title: replicateEverything 0.7.2
text: Re-audited full exported surface (29 functions) NAMESPACE, DESCRIPTION, live pkgdown reference. Confirmed legacy duplicate exports remain 0.7.0/0.7.1 hard-cut — build_outputs() vs build_study_outputs() validate_outputs() vs check_replication() deliberately distinct (registry/DOI-scoped dispatch vs local-checkout operations), aliases. Fixed stale _pkgdown.yml reference removed prepare_study_for_registry() (now check_and_bake_study()) added missing register_study() entry. Regrouped pkgdown reference index clearer map: Discovery; Run & inspect; Contribute (build & check); Maintainer (registry ops); Maintainer (setup & diagnostics); Shiny app; AI skills. Synced inst/ai/skills/*.md monorepo AI.md 0.7 reality (content drift found beyond pkgdown reference; already matched steps:-, -handoff, build_study_outputs() contract). exported API changes.

Fixed two test-package-replication.R assertions still checked legacy replications: field live GitHub fixture; now check steps: match 0.7 hard-cut. Archived one-registry migration scripts (migrate_studies.R, flatten_registry_stubs.R, migrate_code_format.R, build_artifacts.R, pre-0.7 onboarding/tooling scripts) registry/scripts/archive/; registry CI guides now point scripts/build_outputs.R / scripts/validate_outputs.R . Rewrote package README.md meet--functions, folder-replication-checklist, package-replication-checklist, maintainer-setup vignettes around 0.7 contract: steps: DAG, check_and_bake_study() sole contributor entrypoint, sync_study_to_registry() / register_study() sole maintainer entrypoint (study-local registry/ inst/registry/ handoff, ever). exported API changes.

title: replicateEverything 0.6.0
text: Unified steps: block replication.yml replaces separate prep: / replications: (legacy blocks still compile automatically). [run_replication()] gains given ("parents", "nothing", character vector assumed-complete steps) force. Default given = "parents" requires immediate parent outputs exist errors missing. Shiny shows faceted pipeline (Tables / figures / standalone paths) hover labels; step labels name outputs. Study products live outputs/ (step-named paths); artifacts/ longer used folder-backed studies. language optional [run_replication()] replication one engine. Shiny: collapsible study details (expand DOI); simplified pipeline key; Pipeline tab per object. Shiny: fixed study deep links (?doi=...) — wait browser URL parsing; skip welcome modal opening shared link. Removed legacy path fallbacks (artifacts/, data/processed/ implicit output locations). Study repos must declare write outputs/ paths explicitly. Format steps type: format children tables/figures; run via format = TRUE unless format = FALSE. [configure_local_monorepo()] wires registry + sibling study folders local dev. [study_output_dir()] preferred name display output directory; [study_artifact_dir()] now internal. Step inheritance — extension studies declare paper.extends inherit: steps; inherited pipeline steps run base repo, extension analyses read base outputs/. New vignette: vignette("reanalysis-studies"). Worked example: Fearon & Laitin reanalysis (rep-10.1017-S0003055403000534--alt-1). Studies without article DOI may use paper.study_handle (registry handle) instead paper.doi. paper.article_url — optional publisher landing page https://doi.org/... fails; [paper_article_url()] Shiny bibliography links use . Registry index.csv carries article_url set stub. [list_replications()] gains grouped, include ("display", "pipeline", ""), consolidating [list_replication_groups()] [list_prep_steps()] (deprecated). New overview vignette: vignette("-replicateEverything") (first article site). [list_replications()] gains compact print method (replication_list class). given defaults "nothing" = "everything". [audit_everything()] runs published-value checks tests/substantive/<step_id>.R present (substantive = TRUE default). [check_replication()] reports substantive coverage runs defined checks full_replication = TRUE. New helper: [check_glm_table_benchmark()] logit tables. Filter audits collections = (e.g. "APSR") dois =. Package website: serve docs/ main; run Rscript scripts/build_pkgdown.R locally commit full docs/ tree (CI). pkgdown CI workflow manual-(workflow_dispatch). Live replication Shiny Run now execute missing upstream DAG steps (parents:) tables figures; Shiny loads merged study metadata pipeline graphs handle-registry entries. Output convention: transform steps write flat outputs/<step_id>.<ext> (e.g. outputs/analysis_data.rds); data steps appear Shiny sidebar Display/Run head() kable preview; pipeline labels add (R) / (Stata) table label appears twice. Registry handoff: [prepare_study_for_registry()] (contributor) validates folder- package-backed study writes short yaml registry/ inst/registry/. [sync_study_to_registry()] [refresh_registry()] (maintainer) install stubs, rebuild index.csv, optionally rerun [audit_everything()]. New skill: include_study_in_registry.md.

Study cache downloads unzip filesystem cache directory (system /tmp), moving extracted repo cache atomic Linux servers /tmp Samba/NFS cache different mounts. cross-device file.rename fallback also uses single recursive copy suppresses EXDEV warning. Study Stata dependency scripts (install_stata_deps.etc.) now run per study per session instead every prep step table, repeated live runs longer re-trigger slow SSC reinstall/recompile. missing-dependency retry still forces re-run. Set options(replicateEverything.install_stata_deps = FALSE) skip study dependency installation entirely manage Stata packages . Cached GitHub study checkouts now refresh remote commit changes. materialize_folder_study_from_github() records downloaded commit SHA compares current remote SHA (via GitHub API); stale cache (e.g. one built new data files committed) re-downloaded automatically. remote SHA determined (offline rate-limited) existing cache kept. fixes live Stata/Python runs failing “file found” data exists repo missing --date server cache. remote check -demand (study actually run/fetched GitHub) skipped short, per-session window study confirmed fresh, repeated resolutions within one run make one API call per study; tune options(replicateEverything.study_cache_ttl = <seconds>) (default 300; 0 always check). Python replications now run resolved study folder (local sibling materialized GitHub clone) instead falling back R working directory.
